title: T-132 — UI: Dashboard KPI counters region (npd_dashboard prototype) NPD-e slice of T-052
prompt:
# T-132 — Dashboard KPI counters slice

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §11.1, §11.7 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md NpdDashboard
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:32-174 (NpdDashboard top counters/stats region)
Prototype-index entry: npd_dashboard
Parent root: T-052

## Goal
Single Client Component DashboardCounters: top dashboard region with KPI tiles (Total FAs, by-status counts Done/Pending/Blocked, Overdue alerts count). Renders as a row of shadcn Card tiles with Badge variants for status counts. Consumes summary prop from parent; no DB call.

## Implementation contract
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_components/dashboard-counters.tsx ('use client'). Props: { summary: DashboardSummary } where DashboardSummary = { totalFas, byStatus: { done, pending, blocked }, overdueAlerts }.
- Render a row of shadcn Card tiles (KpiCard pattern), each with title + value + optional Badge variant (default/secondary/destructive) for the count.
- Overdue alerts tile uses destructive Badge variant if overdueAlerts > 0.
- No DB call inside the component (parent RSC provides summary).

## Files (≤ 2)
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_components/dashboard-counters.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_components/__tests__/dashboard-counters.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given DashboardCounters renders with a fixed summary prop, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:32-174 (top counters region), then it shows Total FAs tile + by-status tiles (Done/Pending/Blocked) + Overdue alerts tile using shadcn Card + Badge primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist
2. Given overdueAlerts > 0, when the panel renders, then the Overdue tile uses the destructive Badge variant and shows the count — verified by RTL
3. Given the parent passes a new summary prop, when the component re-renders, then values update reactively — verified by RTL rerender test

## Test strategy
- RED: dashboard-counters.test.tsx asserting tile structure, badge variants, reactive rerender before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test dashboard-counters'

## Risk red lines
- Do not call DB or Server Actions from the client component
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not exceed scope (1 component + 1 test)
